title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 87.510 - Honorary members admitted
text:
87.510.  Honorary members admitted. — Any such association may provide for the admission of honorary members in such manner and under such conditions as may be set forth in their articles of association and incorporation.
(RSMo 1939 § 9547) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8982; 1919 § 10306; 1909 § 3462
